title: Chaos Trader
description:
Data pack
buy chaos items from the chaos trader
and destroy your opponent
this data pack is available from
1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you Chaos Trader Data pack.

YOU ARE HERE THAT MEANS YOU ARE SEARCHING FOR SOME COOL DATAPACK
YOU ARE BORED TO PLAY SAME MINECRAFT SURVIVAL .

SO THAT'S WHY I MADE THIS DATAPACK
IN THIS DATAPACK YOU CAN BUY 13 CHAOS ITEMS FROM THE TRADER.

CHAOS ITEMS ARE EXTREMELY POWERFULL AND HAVING BEST POSSIBLE ENCHANTMENTS
ONE ATTACK IS ENOUGH TO KILL ANY MOBS

ENJOY THIS CHAOS ITEMS AND MAKE SURE YOU DOWNLOAD
THE TEXTURE/ RESOURCES PACK FOR BETTER EXPERIENCE.

AND FOR MORE ENTERTAINMENT YOU CAN DOWNLOAD MY CHAOS APPLE DATAPACK.

Buy this Items from Chaos Trader.

make sure u reload the datapack or force load it.

You can summon the trader by /function chaos:summon/chaos_creator
or by using /function chaos:main

Optifine required for texture pack.

materials are:-

1)Chaos Tools
2)Chaos Sword
3)Chaos Shield
4)Chaos Armor
5)Chaos Trident
6)Chaos Bow
7)Chaos Elytra
8)Chaos Arrow

this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16-1.20.1

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Chaos Trader Data Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
